subcodes.first_line: The traces of thy pen were presented before the Ancient King and were observed. Thou didst make mention of one unlearned; all are unlearned before the Ocean of Knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اثر قلم نزد مالک قدم حاضر و مشاهده شد ذکر عامی نموده بودی کل نزد بحر علم عامی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @outward and inward meanings, @knowledge; recognition of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
